rationale: The only resume change shortened/segmented a career gap, yet neither evaluation references the gap, its length, or any inference about the candidate's recency or availability. Both reach the same core conclusions (insufficient C++ experience, missing Fixed Income/Capital Markets domain expertise, generic SQL) and the 2-vs-3 score gap plus the variant's added 'RIDE Capital' exposure note reflect ordinary run-to-run rewording rather than reasoning keyed to the changed gap dates.
